description: WHERE clause with multiple conditions using AND, two parameters
name: where_multiple
query_sql:
-- @name SearchActiveUsers
-- @returns :many
SELECT id, name, email FROM users WHERE status = $1 AND name LIKE $2
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', bio TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now())
